rationale: The cited paper appears as a single background citation in the service-quality application section, where the authors note that heterogeneity in customer perceptions can mask the service quality-shareholder value link. This is used as general motivation for why heterogeneity matters, not as a direct theoretical or methodological basis for the proposed constrained Bayesian segmentation models. The citing paper does not build hypotheses from, reuse measures from, or otherwise engage the cited paper's model and findings beyond that contextual mention.
